name: 2 PRE + CRE Stack
description_html:
Stack and save!

The 2 PRE + CRE stack is a top selling stack for a reason. It features Prolific Pre-Workout, High Volume Caffeine-Free Pre-Workout, and TruCreatine.

TruCreatine is taken daily to maximize muscle and strength gains.

High Volume is a caffeine-free pump powerhouse and can be used on days you have already had your caffeine, are hitting the cardio real hard, or are working out close to bed.

Prolific is packed with caffeine, cognitive aids, and performance ingredients for a full-spectrum workout experience. Want a hit of energy with an insane pump? Try 1 scoop of each.

name: Alphamine Thermogenic Pre-Workout
description_html:
Available only on Amazon.

Alphamine is the legendary powdered thermogenic pre-workout, powered by multiple forms of caffeine, choline, and carnitine. Use Alphamine like an energy drink, or combine it with High Volume on your workout days. At 60 scoops per bottle you won't find a better value, or a more delicious taste. Popular among those looking for daily energy and focus, or used as a pre-workout for those in a leaning-phase of their diet.

name: Amino IV 2-Pack
description_html:
Save $10 when buying a 2-pack!

Amino IV delivers BCAAs, EAAs, electrolytes, and taurine. 

Since 2013 we have understood the importance of consuming EAAs alongside BCAAs, and through our careful processes have designed the flavors to be extremely refreshing and thirst quenching.

Amino IV is most often used during training sessions, whether it be as a source of electrolytes to stay hydrated in place of a typical carbohydrate-loaded sports drink, or as a source to stimulate muscle protein synthesis via the amino acids.

name: Amino IV BCAAs + EAAs
description_html:
Amino IV delivers BCAAs, EAAs, electrolytes, and taurine. 

Since 2013 we have understood the importance of consuming EAAs alongside BCAAs, and through our careful processes have designed the flavors to be extremely refreshing and thirst quenching.

Amino IV is most often used during training sessions, whether it be as a source of electrolytes to stay hydrated in place of a typical carbohydrate-loaded sports drink, or as a source to stimulate muscle protein synthesis via the amino acids.

name: Collagen Peptides
description_html:
Our Collagen Peptides feature 10 g hydrolyzed bovine (hide) collagen, Type I and III and 100% DV of Vitamin C from acerola fruit juice.

Mix easily into any flavored beverage. Our collagen peptides are ideal for skin, joint, and bone support.

name: Complete-GI Gut Health Powder
description_html:
Complete-GI is a true full-spectrum gut health powder, supporting your upper, middle, and lower gut.

It contains 2B CFUs of shelf-stable probiotics, digestive enzymes designed for complex and higher protein diets, 3 g of prebiotic oat fiber for regularity support, L-Glutamine for gut lining support, and PepZin-GI for indigestion support.

Available in an unflavored format to easily add to an existing drink or smoothie, or in a delicious raspberry flavor.

name: Cookbook: High Protein Breakfast Recipes
description_html: Explore dozens of recipes with our new buttermilk protein pancake & waffle mix! Instant digital download, on us!

name: Cookbook: Savory Protein Recipes
description_html:
This instant digital download cookbook is a recipe masterpiece created by Matt Rosenman, aka @CheatDayDesign. Included is 30 delicious savory recipes that use our Select Multi-Purpose Protein blend. From bagels and biscuits to pizza and calzones, get ready to learn all new high protein recipes! Matt provides the macro breakdown for every recipe, with easy to follow, detailed instructions. Enjoy endless options with Select Multipurpose Protein!

Don't forget to tag us in all of your creations! @pescience

name: Erase Pro+ Cortisol Support
description_html:
Erase Pro+ is the legendary hardening agent, focused around its cortisol supporting benefits. 

Cortisol is the stress hormone, which tends to spike under physical or mental stress. It is catabolic, meaning it breaks down muscle tissue while shifting your body into a fat-storing state at the same time.

Those who are training rigorously, on a tough diet, or feel stress is impeding their goals may want to consider 4-8 weeks Erase Pro+.

name: Essentials Stack 60-Days
description_html:
Save $10 with this stack!

The Essentials Stack features a 2-month supply of 2 popular daily staples, TruMutli and Omega-3+.

Both of these products are used on a daily basis, and are formulated and designed with a scientific foundation. Omega-3+ is highly concentrated in DHA and EPA, while TruMulti has everything you need in terms of vitamins and minerals, with nothing that you don't.

name: Gift Card
description_html: PEScience Gift Cards are available in $5, $10, $25, $50, and $100 increments.

name: Greens & Superfoods
description_html:
Our perfected blend of Greens & Superfoods features wheatgrass juice, freeze-dried greens such as kale, broccoli, and spinach, plus mushroom extracts like chaga, reishi, turkey tail, agaricus blazei, shiitake, and maitake.

You will taste the difference of freeze-dried in every scoop with our smooth, light, natural flavor. If you really hate the taste of greens, give our lime or NEW berry flavor a try!

name: Greens + Reds & Blues Stack
description_html:
Save $10 with this stack! The Greens Reds & Blues stack provides just that, and more.

Greens & Superfoods brings key micronutrients found in greens like chlorophyll, along with beta-glucans from our blend of mushroom extracts. 

Exotic Reds & Blues delivers a wide variety of antioxidants across a full spectrum of fruits, some common, others hard to implement in your daily diet. We also have a full serving of myo-inositol in every scoop, also known as vitamin B8, commonly found in fresh fruits.

name: Haze Sleep Powder
description_html:
New to Haze? Start with 1 packet your first 2 nights.

This complete, fully-formulated sleep powder helps you relax before bed and give you a deeper, improved sleep throughout the night. Haze works in just one single dose, but also gets better with time when used nightly.

Many of its research-backed ingredients show effectiveness in a single dose, and improvement over 30-60 days of continued use. Haze uses a highly-bioavailable form of magnesium at its foundation, has a naturally slightly-sweet taste, and gets its color from the high antioxidant content of its ingredients.

Mix with just 4-8oz water, or with your favorite night time tea. Melatonin-free.

name: High Volume 2-Pack
description_html:
Save $10 with a 2-pack.

High Volume is the king of pumps, loaded with 6 g of pure L-citrulline, patented amino-nitrates, and electrolytes.

This caffeine-free pre-workout pump powerhouse will take your workout to the next level without any stimulants. Centered around multiple pump and performance ingredients like citrulline, taurine, and arginine nitrate, there is a reason High Volume has stood the test of time.

High Volume is a favorite among those who are wanting to avoid caffeine before weight-training or endurance training, who are consuming caffeine from another source, or are training at night.

Beta alanine free. No skin itching or tingling. Deliciously flavored, High Volume is the perfect stimulant-free preworkout. Stack with Prolific or Versa to add energy, or use as a standalone.

name: High Volume Stim-Free Pre-Workout
description_html:
High Volume is the king of pumps, loaded with 6 g of pure L-citrulline, patented amino-nitrates, and electrolytes.

This caffeine-free pre-workout pump powerhouse will take your workout to the next level without any stimulants. Centered around multiple pump and performance ingredients like citrulline, taurine, and arginine nitrate, there is a reason High Volume has stood the test of time.

High Volume is a favorite among those who are wanting to avoid caffeine before weight-training or endurance training, who are consuming caffeine from another source, or are training at night.

Beta alanine free. No skin itching or tingling. Deliciously flavored, High Volume is the perfect stimulant-free preworkout. Stack with Prolific or Versa to add energy, or use as a standalone.

name: ISOLATE Protein
description_html:
Crafted for those lactose-intolerant individuals who demand high-quality, fast-digesting protein. Our 100% whey protein isolate is the perfect choice for those with dairy sensitivities.

Each serving provides a high protein content with minimal carbs and fats, ensuring optimal muscle recovery and lean muscle support.

✔ 100% Whey Protein Isolate – Pure, fast-digesting protein
✔ 25g Protein – Packed into every serving
✔ Ultra-Clean Formula – Low in carbs and fats
✔ Delicious Taste & Easy Mixing – Taste & texture unlike any other isolate protein
✔ Third-party tested for purity

name: KKFIT Stack
description_html:
Shop KK FITs current favorites! 

1 x Versalyte Charged, in their signature Sour Watermelon flavor

1 x TruCreatine Powder

1 x Mag-GP Magnesium Powder

name: Lean Mass Stack
description_html:
Stack and save!

The Lean Mass Stack is the simple yet always popular combination of protein and creatine, from the makers of the famous Select Protein and TruCreatine.

This stack gives you the superior whey casein blend of Select, with micronized creatine monohydrate in TruCreatine.

Choose between Select Protein, ISOLATE, or Select Vegan Protein, and TruCreatine Powder or TruCreatine Capsules.

name: Mag-GP Magnesium Powder
description_html:
60 servings. High-bioavailability and high-absorption magnesium glycerophosphate chelate is the newest form of magnesium that brings everything you want.

Taste-free, dissolves easily, and digests perfectly. Get all the benefits of magnesium from sleep to muscle and bone support in an easy to drink daily powder. Third party tested for quality and purity.

name: Omega-3+ EPA & DHA 60-Days
description_html:
60-day supply. 440mg of EPA and 240mg DHA in 2 small softgels. 

Omega-3+ is a smaller-than-normal softgel designed to be easier to swallow, while still delivering a high concentration of both EPA and DHA.

These softgels are about half the size of your typical fish oil, yet deliver more EPA and DHA. It's not magic, it's just science. Burp-friendly with no fishy aftertaste.

name: PEScience Sample Starter Pack
description_html:
This sample starter pack includes a total of 15 samples including proteins, pre-workouts & more. Below is a list of the current samples in this starter pack.

  • Select Protein - Snickerdoodle, Cake Pop, Peanut Butter Cookie, Gourmet Vanilla, Frosted Chocolate Cupcake, Chocolate Truffle, Frosted Sugar Cookie
  • Protein4Oats - Maple Brown Sugar
  • Prolific Pre-Workout - Melon Berry Twist, Guava Pineapple, Sour Peach Candy
  • High Volume Pre-Workout - Melon Berry Twist, Sour Green Apple
  • Amino IV - Strawberry Lemonade
  • Protein Pancake & Waffle Mix - Buttermilk

name: PEScience Vegan Sample Starter Pack
description_html:
This sample starter pack includes a total of 15 samples including proteins, pre-workouts & more. Below is a list of the current samples in this starter pack.

  • Select Vegan Protein - Peanut Butter Delight (3), Chocolate Peanut Butter (3), Chocolate Bliss (3)
  • Prolific Pre-Workout - Sour Peach Candy, Guava Pineapple Punch
  • High Volume Pre-Workout - Melon Berry Twist, Sour Green Apple
  • Amino IV - Strawberry Lemonade
  • Versalyte - Wild Berry, Black Cherry

name: PRE + CRE Stack
description_html:
Stack and save!

The PRE + CRE stack features your choice of 1 pre-workout, and TruCreatine Powder. Choose between PROLIFIC-1 Complete Pre-Workout, Prolific Pre-Workout, or High Volume Caffeine-Free Pre-Workout.

TruCreatine is taken daily to maximize muscle and strength gains.

High Volume is a caffeine-free pump powerhouse and can be used on days you have already had your caffeine, are hitting the cardio real hard, or are working out close to bed.

Prolific is packed with caffeine, cognitive aids, and performance ingredients for a full-spectrum workout experience.

PROLIFIC-1 is our newest, most complete pre-workout that is like combining both Prolific and High Volume in one single scoop.

name: Pre-Workout Sample Kit
description_html:
This pre-workout sample kit is the ultimate option to try each of our currently available sample-size pre-workouts. Each sample packet contains 1 scoop of the product. This sampler currently include 1 of each of the following:

  • Prolific-1 Pre-Workout - Guava Pineapple
  • Prolific Pre-Workout - Guava Pineapple
  • Prolific Pre-Workout - Sour Peach Candy
  • Prolific Pre-Workout - Melon Berry Twist
  • Prolific Pre-Workout - Sour Green Apple
  • High Volume Pump Pre-Workout - Melon Berry Twist
  • High Volume Pump Pre-Workout - Sour Peach Candy
  • High Volume Pump Pre-Workout - Sour Green Apple

name: Prolific + High Volume Stack
description_html:
Save $10 with this stack.

The PRE + CRE stack is a top selling stack for a reason. It features Prolific Pre-Workout, and High Volume Caffeine-Free Pre-Workout.

High Volume is a caffeine-free pump powerhouse and can be used on days you have already had your caffeine, are hitting the cardio real hard, or are working out close to bed.

Prolific is packed with caffeine, cognitive aids, and performance ingredients for a full-spectrum workout experience. Want a hit of energy with an insane pump? Try 1 scoop of each.

name: Prolific 2-Pack
description_html:
Save $10 with the 2-pack.

Prolific is the pre-workout powerhouse that covers the full spectrum of an ultimate workout experience: Powerful energy and focus + long lasting pumps.

Prolific will hit you like the first time, every time, making it the last pre-workout you'll ever need. Deliciously flavored and mixes easily.

Beta alanine free. Zero itch. Zero tingle. Perfectly formulated.

name: Prolific Pre-Workout
description_html:
Prolific is the pre-workout powerhouse that covers the full spectrum of an ultimate workout experience: Powerful energy and focus + long lasting pumps.

Prolific will hit you like the first time, every time, making it the last pre-workout you'll ever need. Deliciously flavored and mixes easily.

Beta alanine free. Zero itch. Zero tingle. Perfectly formulated.

name: Prolific-1 Pre-Workout
description_html:
Prolific-1 is our newest, complete pre-workout. In one single scoop this delivers a moderate amount of caffeine (200 mg), and maximum amounts of cognitive and performance benefits.

It is designed for serious gym enthusiasts who want the perfect amount of energy for the gym, without getting over-stimulated or letting stimulation negate from their performance.

No beta-alanine, so you are free from itching and tingling.

name: Protein Pancake & Waffle Mix
description_html:
Quick and delicious protein pancake & waffles!

Packed with 15g of quality complete protein per serving, this mix has the perfect taste and texture every time by only adding water. The best protein pancakes and protein waffles you will ever experience!

There's no better way to start your day than with a protein-packed, easily digestible, delicious tasting breakfast. This quick and easy mix is made with premium protein and carb sources. Want even more protein? Sub fat-free milk to water!

name: Protein4Oats Protein for Oatmeal
description_html:
Protein for your oatmeal! Specifically formulated and flavored to taste amazing in oatmeal.

The easiest way to make PROATS. 20g protein when added to oatmeal. Low sugar!

This is the fastest and easiest way to get a protein-packed breakfast, without sacrificing taste. Made with the amazing Select Protein whey + casein blend. Oats never tasted so good!

name: Reds & Blues + myo-Inositol
description_html:
Our Exotic Reds & Blues takes a unique approach in delivering not just "reds", but also the powerful "blues and purples", yielding a wide-spectrum of antioxidants. We don't only use common fruits, but include many exotic fruits that most people can't incorporate into their everyday diet.

Reds and blues typically get their color from a class of antioxidants known as anthocyanins and carotenoids, but limiting your supplement to just one color of fruit only gives you a fraction of the antioxidants that exist across multiple colored-fruits. All this, combined with a full 2 g serving of myo-inositol makes for a completely packed health supplement.

name: Select Cafe Series Protein
description_html:
Ditch your coffee and 'Select The Best'.

Select Cafe brings 20g protein in a delicious carb-friendly format. Low in fat and packing 100mg caffeine per serving, these decadent coffee flavors leave no reason to spend $7 on a calorie-packed latte again.

Available in two delicious flavors: Caramel Macchiato and Iced Mocha.. Blend a frappe, add ice cubes like your favorite iced coffee, or mix it with hot water and a frother!

name: Select Protein - Variety Pack
description_html:
Variety Packs change frequently based on what is in stock. Check below before ordering!

The Select Protein Variety Pack contains 5 servings of each flavor, in two size options:

5 different flavors, for a total of 25 servings includes:

Cake Pop, Peanut Butter Cookie, Snickerdoodle, Strawberry Cheesecake, Cookies N Cream + 1 shaker cup (color may vary from photo)

8 different flavors, for a total of 40 servings includes:

Chocolate Truffle, Peanut Butter Cookie, Gourmet Vanilla, Snickerdoodle, Strawberry Cheesecake, Cake Pop, Cookies N Cream, Frosted Chocolate Cupcake + 1 shaker cup (color may vary from photo)

name: Select Protein Powder
description_html:
Select Protein is a premium blend of whey and casein protein, perfectly flavored to taste true to each flavor's name, leaving you craving more every day.

Select is third-party tested for quality and purity. This low-carb, gluten-free formula uses milk protein isolate as its #1 ingredient, rarely used in protein powders due to its high cost. Milk protein isolate is very low in lactose giving Select Protein great digestion.

Read below to learn something new about protein powders and how Select Protein stands apart.

name: Select Protein Sample Kit
description_html:
This Select Protein Sampler Kit includes a total of 8 samples. Each sample is a half scoop of Select Protein, meant to be added to 4oz of water to taste the flavor. The sample kit flavors currently shipping are:

  • Cake Pop
  • Frosted Sugar Cookie
  • Chocolate Truffle
  • Gourmet Vanilla
  • Chocolate Peanut Butter Cup
  • Snickerdoodle
  • Peanut Butter Cookie
  • Frosted Chocolate Cupcake

name: Select Protein Shake - RTD
description_html:
Meet the easiest way to enjoy our famous Select Protein: a smooth, ready to drink (RTD) shake with a whey + casein blend for sustained, satisfying protein. Each bottle delivers 25g of complete protein with just 0–1g of sugar and is extremely low in lactose, so it’s easy on your stomach and your routine.

Available in two decadent flavors: Chocolate Truffle and Vanilla Cupcake. This is the on-the-go protein shake that actually tastes like a treat, not a chore.

Highlights

  • 25g whey + casein protein blend
  • 0-1g sugar, extremely low in lactose
  • Ultra-smooth, easy-to-drink texture
  • Two dessert-inspired flavors: Chocolate Truffle & Vanilla Cupcake
  • Perfect for post-workout, breakfast, or anytime protein on the go
  • Available as a 12-pack or 4-pack

name: Select Unflavored Multi-Purpose Protein Flour
description_html:
This unflavored, unsweetened multipurpose protein blend uses the same perfected whey/casein ratio as our famous Select Protein. This gives the ultimate texture and taste profile for recipes.

Savory recipes are finally possible with this blend, and go wild with your ideas by utilizing it as a partial flour replacement. Be sure to send us your recipes with photos for a chance to be featured on our product label. Calling all baking pros!

Check out the Select Multi-Purpose Savory Cookbook or browse more recipes here!

name: Select Vegan Protein
description_html:
Select Vegan Protein is our premium plant-based protein powder designed for muscle growth and recovery.

Free of soy, gluten, lactose, and naturally sweetened, Select Vegan is the smoothest, most delicious plant-based protein you will find.

We use a specific blend of brown rice and pea protein to deliver an amino acid ratio that closely resembles dairy protein. Read below to see what separated Select Vegan from other plant-based proteins.

name: Shaker Cup
description_html: PEScience Shaker Cup - Available in both 28oz and 20oz. Select the Best in your shakers. The 28oz works easily for 2 scoops of Select Protein. If you're a 1-scooper or looking for something for your pre-workouts or aminos, the 20oz makes a great compact option.

name: Smart Mass Gainer
description_html:
Bulk the right way with Select Smart Mass, the lean mass gainer. 

With clean fats, 25g slow-digesting carbs including a slow-digesting sugar, and 25g protein from whey and casein for fast + slow digestion, we've formulated Smart Mass to be geared for lean mass gains, rather than dirty weight gain from simple sugars and fats.

Looking for a convenient meal replacement? 1 packet of Smart Mass gives a healthy, balanced 225 calorie drink with 25g protein, 25g slow-digesting carbs, and 5g fat.

Smart Mass delivers our unmatched amazing flavor and texture that you won't find in any other weight gainer. Maltodextrin free!

name: Symbiont-GI Gut Support
description_html:
Symbiont-GI is a full-spectrum all-in-one GI support product featuring premium digestive enzymes, LactoSpore® probiotic, and digestive aids like slippery elm bark and the patented PepZin GI®.

This is gut support from top-to-bottom, that would normally be sold as 3 separate products. Symbiont-GI supports the upper, middle, and lower gut.

Take up to 3 capsules daily, 1 with each meal.

name: TruCreatine Capsules
description_html:
TruCreatine Capsules feature 3 grams of Creapure® micronized creatine monohydrate per serving, available in 30 or 90 servings. 

If you are someone who doesn't enjoy mixing powders and are looking for the convenience of taking a capsule, you've come to the right place. 

Take all four at once, or spread them out, completely up to you! The capsules can be easily added into any stack. No need to be overly creative with creatine...we keep it simple and pure.

name: TruCreatine Powder
description_html:
TruCreatine+ Powder is our premium creatine product, featuring Creapure® micronized Creatine Monohydrate. This unflavored creatine mixes great with any of our fruit flavored products, or just with water.

Micronized creatine monohydrate is known for its improved ability to disperse in water as you're mixing it, and TruCreatine+ is third-party tested. No need to be overly creative with creatine...keep it simple and pure.

name: TruGlutamine Powder
description_html:
TruGlutamine Powder is our premium fermented vegan L-Glutamine powder.

Glutamine is an amino acid that is useful in supporting gastrointestinal health, specifically the gut lining.

We provide 30 servings at 5g L-Glutamine per serving, and as always, every batch is third party tested for quality and purity. Unflavored, neutral taste makes it easy to add to anything.

name: TruMulti Men's Multivitamin
description_html:
Now in smaller, easy to swallow capsules. TruMulti for Men is our premium multivitamin product featuring 23 vitamins and minerals. 

Our men's formula excludes iron, which healthy men do not need to supplement, plus bioavailable forms of minerals from amino acid chelates.

Only 3 easy to swallow capsules needed per day. Fill in the micronutrient gaps in your diet with daily dosing of TruMulti.

name: TruMulti Women's Multivitamin
description_html:
Now in smaller, easy to swallow capsules. TruMulti for Women is our premium multivitamin product featuring over 20 vitamins and minerals. 

Our women's formula includes iron, and bioavailable forms of minerals from amino acid chelates. Only 3 easy to swallow capsules needed per day.

Be sure you're getting a variety of nutrients every day by incorporating TruMulti into your daily routine.

name: Ultimate Protein Sample Kit
description_html:
This protein sampler kit contains an assortment of whey and casein-based protein products that we carry. Currently the following products and flavors are included in this sample kit:

  • Select Protein - Half-scoop sample of each flavor below
    • Cake Pop
    • Frosted Sugar Cookie
    • Chocolate Truffle
    • Gourmet Vanilla
    • Chocolate Peanut Butter Cup
    • Snickerdoodle
    • Peanut Butter Cookie
    • Frosted Chocolate Cupcake
  • Protein4Oats - 1 full serving of each flavor below
    • French Toast
    • Maple Brown Sugar
    • Peanut Butter & Honey
  • Protein Pancake & Waffle Mix - 1 full serving
    • Buttermilk Flavor

name: Vegan Protein Sample Kit
description_html:
The Select Vegan Series Protein Sampler Kit includes a total of 8 samples. Each sample is a half scoop of Select Protein, meant to be added to 5oz of water to taste the flavor. The sample kit flavors currently shipping are below, and include 2 of each flavor:

  • Chocolate Bliss (2)
  • Vanilla Indulgence (2)
  • Chocolate Peanut Butter (2)
  • Peanut Butter Delight (2)

name: Vegan Select Protein - Variety Pack
description_html:
The Select Vegan Protein Variety Pack includes 25 total servings, coming from 5 servings of 5 flavors: Chocolate Bliss, Indulgent Vanilla, Chocolate Peanut Butter, Cinnamon Delight, and Peanut Butter Delight. Includes 1 shaker! (color and size of shaker my vary)

Can't decide on a flavor? Give them all a shot before purchasing a bigger size.

name: Versa Energy Drink
description_html:
Let's face it, most energy drinks are good for 1 sip, MAYBE 2 sips, but rarely more than 3 sips.

The number of cans most people make it to the bottom of is few and far between. We set out to change this. We told ourselves we would only create an energy drink if it was truly an order of magnitude above the rest in flavor. Otherwise, it just wasn't interesting for us.

We kept our formula simple, yet perfect. Enough caffeine (125mg) to get you energized, and for those who need a double on the day, you can drink 2 without consuming excessive caffeine. 0 SUGAR. GLUTEN FREE.

name: Versalyte CHARGED Hydration Powder
description_html:
Hydrate & energize, anytime. In partnership with Kathryn & Kendra (@kk_fit_), Versalyte CHARGED combines our popular premium electrolyte blend with 75 mg caffeine and 1000 mg L-tyrosine.

It's perfect combo to hydrate your body and wake up your mind, without over-stimulation.

Most electrolyte blends on the market use the cheapest form of minerals, and are mostly just sodium. As a brand that cares about both science and quality, we use premium forms of 5 different electrolytes, and a moderate level of sodium.

Our combination of 75 mg caffeine + tyrosine, & taurine will awaken your mind, anytime.

Every serving is naturally flavored and sweetened, and includes our signature tart cherry juice to deliver natural antioxidants.

name: Versalyte Electrolytes
description_html:
Whether you are wanting intra-training hydration or just looking for a tasty way to hydrate better throughout the day, Versalyte comes in clutch.

Rather than making an electrolyte powder that is 90% overpriced table salt like most products out there, we focused on the important electrolytes for muscle function, contraction, and hydration.

Additionally, we include a full serving of tart cherry juice powder for its powerful antioxidant potential and benefits on muscle function.

Available in 4 flavors, with 30 stick packs per bag. Now also available in a variety pack of 12 stick packs so you can try them all!
